workflows.name: Development Mode
workflows.description: Starts the application in development mode with live reloading

workflows.name: Production Build
workflows.description: Builds and starts the application in production mode
workflows.command: npm run build && NODE_ENV=production node dist/index.js

workflows.name: Deploy Application
workflows.description: Builds and deploys the application for production use
workflows.command: npm run build && NODE_ENV=production node dist/index.js

workflows.name: Database Management
workflows.description: Manages database schema updates and migrations
